(French pronunciation: [[sɛ̃ sipʁijɛ̃ də napjɛʁvil]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French")) is a municipality in [Les Jardins-de-Napierville Regional County Municipality](/wiki/Les_Jardins-de-Napierville_Regional_County_Municipality "Les Jardins-de-Napierville Regional County Municipality") in [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec"), [Canada](/wiki/Canada "Canada"), situated in the [Montérégie](/wiki/Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie "Montérégie") administrative region. The population as of the [2021 Canadian census](/wiki/2021_Canadian_census "2021 Canadian census") was 1,735. It completely encircles the village of [Napierville](/wiki/Napierville "Napierville").

["*Banque de noms de lieux du Québec*: Reference number 402429"](https://toponymie.gouv.qc.ca/ct/ToposWeb/fiche.aspx?no_seq=402429). *toponymie.gouv.qc.ca* (in French). [Commission de toponymie du Québec](/wiki/Commission_de_toponymie_du_Qu%C3%A9bec "Commission de toponymie du Québec").

["2021 Community Profiles"](http://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2021/dp-pd/prof/index.cfm?Lang=E). *[2021 Canadian census](/wiki/2021_Canadian_census "2021 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. February 4, 2022. Retrieved 2022-08-23.

["2016 Community Profiles"](http://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2016/dp-pd/prof/index.cfm?Lang=E). *[2016 Canadian census](/wiki/2016_Canadian_census "2016 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. August 12, 2021. Retrieved 2022-07-04.

["2011 Community Profiles"](http://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2011/dp-pd/prof/index.cfm?Lang=E). *[2011 Canadian census](/wiki/2011_Canadian_census "2011 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. March 21, 2019. Retrieved 2014-04-06.

**Saint-Cyprien-de-Napierville** (French pronunciation: [[sɛ̃ sipʁijɛ̃ də napjɛʁvil]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French")) is a municipality in [Les Jardins-de-Napierville Regional County Municipality](/wiki/Les_Jardins-de-Napierville_Regional_County_Municipality "Les Jardins-de-Napierville Regional County Municipality") in [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec"), [Canada](/wiki/Canada "Canada"), situated in the [Montérégie](/wiki/Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie "Montérégie") administrative region. The population as of the [2021 Canadian census](/wiki/2021_Canadian_census "2021 Canadian census") was 1,735. It completely encircles the village of [Napierville](/wiki/Napierville "Napierville").
